---
title: "Your Title Here"
status: seed
categories: [Mental Model]
draft: true
---

<!-- Status options: seed | developing | mature -->
<!-- Categories: Mental Model, Ship Note -->
<!-- Remove draft: true when ready to publish -->

## The Problem

What question or challenge does this address?

## The Framework

Core idea in your own words.

## Applied Example

Where you've used this and what happened.

## When This Breaks

Limitations and boundary conditions.
